'''sashupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zealotist|zealotist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zealotist|zealotist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sashupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæshipith|sæshipith]] || [[word:sæshipij|sæshipij]] || [[word:sæshipish|sæshipish]] || [[word:sæshipi|sæshipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashushuputh|sashushuputh]] || [[word:sashushupuj|sashushupuj]] || [[word:sashushupush|sashushupush]] || [[word:sashushupu|sashushupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashuputh|sashuputh]] || [[word:sashupuj|sashupuj]] || [[word:sashupush|sashupush]] || [[word:sashupu|sashupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashufputh|sashufputh]] || [[word:sashufpuj|sashufpuj]] || [[word:sashufpush|sashufpush]] || [[word:sashufpuf|sashufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sashuputhu|sashuputhu]] || [[word:sashupuju|sashupuju]] || [[word:sashupushu|sashupushu]] || [[word:sashupuku|sashupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sashuputh|sashuputh]] || [[word:sashupuj|sashupuj]] || [[word:sashupush|sashupush]] || [[word:sashupu|sashupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sashuputhul|sashuputhul]] || [[word:sashupujul|sashupujul]] || [[word:sashupushul|sashupushul]] || [[word:sashupukul|sashupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sashuputhuthu|sashuputhuthu]] || [[word:sashupujuju|sashupujuju]] || [[word:sashupushushu|sashupushushu]] || [[word:sashupuku|sashupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sashuputhun|sashuputhun]] || [[word:sashupujun|sashupujun]] || [[word:sashupushun|sashupushun]] || [[word:sashupukun|sashupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sashuputhuoro|sashuputhuoro]] || [[word:sashupujuoro|sashupujuoro]] || [[word:sashupushuoro|sashupushuoro]] || [[word:sashupukuoro|sashupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
